objective: Discover a native model architecture or learning mechanism that improves broad, contamination-resistant capability while reducing active compute, memory traffic, or adaptation cost on ordinary local hardware. Do not assume the winning mechanism is a Transformer, Mamba, mixture-of-experts system, conventional distillation pipeline, retrieval wrapper, or agent shell.
forbidden_defaults: Do not preselect Transformer, Mamba, state-space, mixture-of-experts, retrieval, or conventional distillation as the architecture.
Do not call orchestration, prompting, or tool use a native model improvement.
Do not optimize one public benchmark or one scalar score.
Do not hide repeated inference, retrieval, cache, or external tool costs.
operator_constraints: Every external dependency must name an experiment, license, immutable pin, and sandbox boundary.
Every promoted result requires matched compute, hidden evaluation, at least two seeds, broad regression, and a resource receipt.
Merge, deployment, model export, dependency installation, and training spend remain human-authorized.
